# Prescriber Summary

## Current Medications

- **Sertraline 50 mg** — [[CYP2D6]] reduced activity (*4/*10). Monitor for accumulation. Evidence tier E1.
- Consider [[IL1B]] rs16944 G;G when evaluating SSRI non-response (E3, single study).

## Priority Actions

- [ ] Request CRP blood test from prescriber — [[IL1B]] inflammatory profile suggests monitoring ^task-crp-test [priority:: critical] [context:: testing] [due:: 2026-04-15]
- [ ] Request ferritin + transferrin saturation panel — [[HFE]] rs1800562 A;G carrier status ^task-iron-panel [priority:: critical] [context:: testing] [due:: 2026-04-15]
- [x] Reviewed CYP2D6 metabolizer status with prescriber [priority:: high] [context:: prescriber] [due:: 2026-03-15]
- [ ] Discuss nortriptyline as IBS-D adjunct — [[CYP2D6]] intermediate metabolizer, dose adjustment needed ^task-nortriptyline [priority:: high] [context:: prescriber] [due:: 2026-04-30]

## Pharmacogenomic Notes

Per [[CYP2D6]] likely *4/*10 status (reduced activity), standard doses of tricyclic antidepressants may require reduction by 25-50%. CPIC guidelines recommend starting at lower doses with therapeutic drug monitoring.

The [[IL1B]] rs16944 G;G genotype has been associated with SSRI non-remission in one study (OR 1.74, E3-E4). This is not sufficient to change treatment but warrants monitoring of inflammatory markers.
